backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining data types (academic entries, coding challenges/attempts, user profiles) and state management for an academic progress and coding practice application with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (combined percentage view, nine-scale grades, subject analysis, certificates) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated documentation summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, key behaviors, and implementation details for the academic tracker application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport/SEO meta tags and a root div that mounts the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling authentication state, actor initialization, profile setup gating, module routing (academic/coding/data/users), and top-level error/loading states with ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AcademicModule.t: Academic module container rendering a six-tab interface (Add Marks, Progress, Subject Analysis, 9-Scale Grades, Combined %, Certificates), each tab wrapped in an ErrorBoundary.
frontend/src/components/AddMarksForm.tsx: Marks entry form supporting all grades 1–12 with grade/term/stream selectors, Science and Commerce subgroup pickers, board exam mode, elective math selection, and AI substitution preview before submission.
Displays academic certificates per grade/term combination, computing a certificate percentage from term scores and assigning platinum/gold/silver/bronze tiers with corresponding badge colors and images. Supports filtering by grade and term.
frontend/src/components/CodingEditor.tsx: A Python coding editor component that lets users select a challenge, write code, run it in-browser via Pyodide, and save attempts with an optional score to the backend.
frontend/src/components/CodingHistory.ts: Displays a paginated accordion list of past coding attempts, showing challenge title, score badge, timestamp, submitted code, and output for each attempt.
frontend/src/components/CodingModule.tsx: Container component that wraps CodingEditor and CodingHistory in a tabbed interface, each protected by an ErrorBoundary.
frontend/src/components/CombinedPercenta: Shows an overall combined percentage per grade by averaging adjusted term percentages across all terms, with color-coded badges and a formula explanation card.
frontend/src/components/DataManagement.t: Provides export (JSON and CSV) and import functionality for academic entries, handling BigInt serialization/deserialization and CSV formatting of all subject fields.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: A React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with a retry button, plus a withErrorBoundary HOC helper.
frontend/src/components/ErrorMessage.tsx: Reusable alert component that displays error, warning, or info messages with an optional retry button using lucide icons and shadcn Alert primitives.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with an animated heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with app branding, module navigation buttons (Academic, Coding, Data, and admin-only Users), theme toggle, and Internet Identity login/logout.
frontend/src/components/LoadingState.tsx: Configurable loading spinner component supporting small/medium/large sizes and an optional full-screen overlay mode.
frontend/src/components/NineScaleGradesV: Displays academic entries converted to a 9-point grading scale, with grade/term filters and per-subject breakdown cards showing raw marks, percentage, and nine-scale score.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Form card that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and saves it as their profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProgressView.tsx: Academic progress dashboard showing line/bar charts and summary stats (average, highest, lowest) for term percentages, filterable by grade.
frontend/src/components/SubjectAnalysisV: Displays per-subject statistics (average marks, percentage, highest/lowest) computed from academic entries, with grade and term filter dropdowns.
frontend/src/components/UserManagement.t: React component that provides a UI for assigning roles (admin, user, guest) to users by entering their Principal ID, using the useAssignCallerUserRole mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePyodide.ts: Custom hook that lazily loads the Pyodide WebAssembly Python runtime from CDN and exposes a runPython function that executes Python code and captures stdout/stderr output.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the backend actor, covering academic entries, board exam results, grade aggregates, coding challenges, user profiles, and role management mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet that defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/boardExam.ts: Utility library for board exam calculations including Grade 10 AI subject substitution logic, total score computation, and encoding/decoding of subgroup metadata strings.
frontend/src/lib/frequencyPolygon.ts: Computes frequency distributions of academic entry percentages into 10-point intervals, with helpers to filter by grade/term and extract unique grades and terms.
frontend/src/lib/gradeCalculation.ts: Provides utilities for converting percentages to letter grades, 9-point scale grades, grade colors, and raw marks to percentage calculations.
frontend/src/lib/maxMarks.ts: Defines grade-wise max marks configurations per subject and provides helpers to retrieve expected max marks for a subject/grade/term combination and build subject lists by grade/stream.
frontend/src/lib/percent.ts: Utility functions for clamping, formatting percentages, and computing adjusted/combined term percentages using the formula (original + 94) / 2.
frontend/src/lib/subjectAnalysis.ts: Computes per-subject statistics (average, highest, lowest raw marks and percentages) from academic entries with optional grade and term filters.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's versioned state including architectural notes, existing implemented features, and pending feature requests for the educational grading app.
